---
title: "Claims & Confidence"
subtitle: "Every claim, its declared grade, and what real evidence would move it"
---

::: {.page-context}
::: {.pc-crumb}
Evidence <span class="sep">›</span> Claims &amp; Confidence
:::
::: {.pc-supports}
**This page answers "what is still unvalidated?"** for every claim, and what it would take to change
that.
:::
::: {.pc-row}
<span class="chip chip-neutral no-dot">From the claim register</span>
<span class="pc-next">[Open the Evidence Register](evidence-register.qmd)</span>
:::
:::

Each claim below reads from `data/sample/claim_register.csv`. Its **declared grade** is what we
currently believe; its **real evidence** count reads from `data/processed/discovery_evidence.csv`. A
claim only advances to grade **B** when the "needed for B" bar is met by independent, low-bias
evidence.

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
import sys, pathlib
_root = pathlib.Path.cwd()
while _root != _root.parent and not (_root / "src").is_dir():
    _root = _root.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_root))
from IPython.display import HTML
from src.registers import (load_claim_register, claim_evidence_counts,
                           _grade_chip, _esc)

claims = load_claim_register()
```

## Confidence summary

```{python}
#| label: summary
#| echo: false
rows = []
for _, c in claims.iterrows():
    counts = claim_evidence_counts(c["claim_id"])
    rows.append(
        "<tr>"
        f'<td><code>{_esc(c["claim_id"])}</code></td>'
        f'<td>{_esc(c["decision_id"])}</td>'
        f'<td>{_esc(c["claim_type"])}</td>'
        f'<td>{_grade_chip(c["current_confidence_grade"])}</td>'
        f'<td>{_esc(c["status"])}</td>'
        f'<td>{counts["total"]}</td>'
        "</tr>"
    )
HTML(
    '<table class="table"><thead><tr>'
    '<th>Claim</th><th>Decision</th><th>Type</th><th>Grade</th><th>Status</th>'
    '<th>Real evidence</th></tr></thead><tbody>' + "".join(rows) + '</tbody></table>'
)
```

## Claim by claim

For each claim: its declared grade, what real evidence currently exists (from discovery interviews),
and what is still needed to reach grades B and A.

```{python}
#| label: per-claim
#| echo: false
blocks = []
for _, c in claims.iterrows():
    counts = claim_evidence_counts(c["claim_id"])
    if counts["total"] == 0:
        real = '<span class="text-muted-sig">none yet — hypothesis</span>'
    else:
        real = (f'{counts["supports"]} support · {counts["refutes"]} refute · '
                f'{counts["mixed"]} mixed · {counts["neutral"]} neutral')
    blocks.append(
        '<div class="framework-card">'
        '<div class="fc-head">'
        f'<p class="fc-title">{_esc(c["claim_id"])}</p>'
        f'{_grade_chip(c["current_confidence_grade"])}'
        f'<span class="chip chip-neutral no-dot">{_esc(c["decision_id"])} · {_esc(c["claim_type"])}</span>'
        f'<p class="fc-q">{_esc(c["claim_text"])}</p>'
        '</div>'
        '<div class="fc-body">'
        f'<div class="fc-field"><div class="fc-label">Real evidence today</div><div class="fc-val">{real}</div></div>'
        f'<div class="fc-field"><div class="fc-label">Needed for grade B</div><div class="fc-val">{_esc(c["evidence_needed_for_B"])}</div></div>'
        f'<div class="fc-field"><div class="fc-label">Needed for grade A</div><div class="fc-val">{_esc(c["evidence_needed_for_A"])}</div></div>'
        '</div>'
        '</div>'
    )
HTML('<div class="framework-grid">' + "".join(blocks) + "</div>")
```

::: {.callout-important appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Reading the grades.** Every claim is currently a **hypothesis (grade C or D)**. None is validated
(grade A), and none is substantiated (grade B) — because the real evidence layer is empty. This is the
honest state at v0.1. Proposal-sourced reasoning is capped at grade C: see
[Hypothesis v0.1](proposal-hypothesis-v01.qmd).
:::
